personas.subtitle: Unframed default reasoning stance
personas.when_to_use: Use as the reference condition for study comparisons.

personas.subtitle: Strongest-objection framing
personas.when_to_use: Use when you want pressure against premature conclusions.

personas.subtitle: Explicit assumptions and precondition checks
personas.when_to_use: Use when terms, assumptions, and constraints must stay explicit.

personas.subtitle: Multiple approaches before committing
personas.when_to_use: Use when comparing multiple plausible paths matters first.

personas.subtitle: Single-answer commitment with explicit tradeoffs
personas.when_to_use: Use when the study needs a clear recommendation over exhaustive exploration.
